name: My New Life As An Adventurer (Isekai Fantasy RPG)
description:
Isekai Fantasy RPG with stats, quests, ranks, classes, finances, abillities and inventory map with custom locations.

Expect wide variety of genders: males females, futas, femboys, tomboys. Now featuring a SLIME SIMULATOR mode (2nd opening message)

You have just woke up in the world of Mirthana, all naked and with nothing to your name. This world is raw and untamed. Aperantly somehow you've been transported to another fantasy medieval world full of wonder, magic, countless different races, beasts, heroes and adventurers.

LATEST UPDATE (05.04.2026)

Not exactly an update, but i had some time and posted all sublocations from the rest of map nodes for your convenience. The full map of the island of Khorinis. Now you know where to navigate, and what to expect, with the help of The System. Check the map section bellow.

GAMEPLAY INSTRUCTIONS:

VERY IMPORTANT!! ACCESS "Generation Settings" AND SET "Max Tokens" VALUE TO ZERO, so the bot will have unlimited reply lenght, as it requires to both narate and display lots of RPG stats at the end of each reply, sometimes for multiple characters at once. You might edit or refresh a reply here and there, but overall you should have fairly nice play seassion.

PLAY WITH STATS BLOCK:

The bot should display your stats at the end of each reply on it's own. But sometimes, you will get replies without block stats. Whenever you get a reply without displaying you STATS block, just refresh the reply until you do, do not try to edit a blockless reply, it is not the same as when the bot displays it on it's own. And then the bot should make a habit of displaying your stats, it may occur again here and there but it should be solvable with a few refreshes and should be stable allaround. You can however edit stats values on an already displayed stats block if the bot messes up some values.

PLAY WITHOUT STATS BLOCK: If you would like to have a playtrough without the bot displaying your stats block, because, i get it, it takes more time and might be annoying to some people, we all have different tastes, just play until you get a reply without displaying your stats and continue from there or, starting from bot's 3rd reply onward, just refresh until you get a reply without displaying your stats block, the bot should make a habit of replying without displaying your stats block. However the bot will not be able to keep accurate track of your stats in the background, it will be just a slight upgrade of a normal narative bot as it can still display, NPC's, monsters and your stats upon request.

Avoid short, plain replies, the bot tends to mix up, spacial and chronological details due to lack of context from the user. Instead be more descriptive in your replies, give the bot more context to work with. When that happens and the bot mixes up details (adding an NPC from a previous encounter to your current location where they shouldn't be, for example), rewind from your last reply and try again with a more descriptive reply, about who, where and why and when (if applicable).

MAP SECTION:
creator: princeofperssia
